# Geotechnical Engineering — Trois-Rivieres

> Geotechnical engineering services in Trois-Rivieres, Canada.

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Trois-Rivieres, Canada.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
